title: Reality Testing Protocols for Cognitive Prosthetics
abstract: Methods for maintaining shared reality consensus

body.text: This paper establishes reality testing protocols as essential components of cognitive prosthetics, ensuring users can maintain consensus reality while benefiting from cognitive support and accommodation.
Cognitive prosthetics that alter perception or cognition must include mechanisms for reality testing to prevent dissociation and ensure users can navigate shared social environments effectively.
P31 Labs artifacts incorporate reality testing through features like shared documentation, collaborative tools, and verifiable outputs that can be checked against external reality.
